peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
analyst_response: Accepted. Zijin is a global mine-development anchor with copper-gold resource depth; project execution; and cross-border operating capability. Cyclicality is a monitoring risk not a reason to exclude it.
calibrated_standard_implication: Global mine developers with scarce reserves; repeatable development capability; and meaningful international position should outrank large smelting or processing platforms.

calibrated_standard_implication: Multiple resource companies can be retained when their resource portfolios and mine-development capabilities are meaningfully different and not weak copies of each other.

peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies should be judged by international monopoly position; margins; capacity constraint; cost competitiveness; and reserve advantage.
analyst_response: Rejected from quality watch. Chalco benefits from scale; integration; and China's electrolytic-aluminum capacity ceiling. The evidence does not show company-level international monopoly or clearly superior global cost curve. Its 2025 gross and net margins are good for a cyclical aluminum platform but not enough to displace stronger resource moats.
calibrated_standard_implication: Aluminum capacity caps or SOE scale are not enough. Aluminum companies require company-specific low-cost power; bauxite or alumina advantage; and global position before entering the quality watchlist.

peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies should be judged by company-level international monopoly position; margins; capacity constraint; cost competitiveness; and reserve advantage.
analyst_response: Rejected for now. Germanium is strategic and China is the leading global producer and exporter. Available authoritative evidence supports country-level concentration more strongly than company-level monopoly. Yunnan Germanium has a full product chain and useful capacity but weak current margins; negative operating cash flow; and insufficient reserve or cost-curve proof keep it out of watch for now.
calibrated_standard_implication: Country-level strategic dominance is not enough. A small-metal company needs source-backed company-level global share; reserves; cost; or process economics before watchlist inclusion.

peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies should be judged by monopoly position; margins; capacity constraint; cost competitiveness; and reserve advantage.
analyst_response: Retained. Salt Lake is not a global potash monopoly. It has a hard-to-replicate domestic strategic-resource position in Qarhan salt-lake potash and salt-lake lithium; very high 2025 margins; large mining-right area after resource integration; and capacity constrained by scarce brine resources and permits.
calibrated_standard_implication: A domestic monopoly or near-monopoly can qualify when the mineral is import-sensitive; resource access is scarce; margins are structurally high; and the advantage is not mainly commodity-price beta.

peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies should be judged by international monopoly position; margins; capacity constraint; cost competitiveness; and reserve advantage.
analyst_response: Rejected from this quality watch. Shandong Gold has strong domestic gold output; resource additions; and deep-mining projects. Gold mining is globally fragmented and its current profitability is heavily helped by gold-price beta. Zijin already covers a stronger diversified gold-resource thesis.
calibrated_standard_implication: Pure gold miners need a stronger company-specific global scale; low-cost curve; reserve; or exploration edge than a retained diversified gold miner before separate watchlist inclusion.

peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies should be judged by international monopoly position; margins; capacity constraint; cost competitiveness; and reserve advantage.
analyst_response: Retained. Xiamen Tungsten is not a pure miner but tungsten is globally supply-concentrated and China applies mining quota controls. The company has an integrated tungsten-molybdenum chain; meaningful upstream self-supply; strong tungsten-molybdenum margins; and globally competitive molybdenum and tungsten material positions.
calibrated_standard_implication: For tungsten retain differentiated companies when resource constraint; quota control; high-value processing; and strong step-level margins are all present. Pure mining status is not required if the processing moat is resource-backed.

peer_group: 有色金属-战略资源与矿业
reviewer_or_inferred_reason: Boundary companies should be judged by international monopoly position; margins; capacity constraint; cost competitiveness; and reserve advantage.
analyst_response: Retained. China Tungsten High-Tech has stronger company-level evidence than a normal material processor. Its annual report describes Shizhuyuan as the world's largest single operating tungsten mine and public disclosures identify its cemented-carbide scale as global No. 1. Margins and R&D intensity are acceptable for high-end tungsten materials.
calibrated_standard_implication: Keep both Xiamen Tungsten and China Tungsten High-Tech because they are differentiated. Xiamen Tungsten is an integrated tungsten-molybdenum and material platform while China Tungsten High-Tech is a hard-alloy tooling and Shizhuyuan-backed tungsten platform.
